query.description: The search query string. Supports inline operators such as `from:jane type:document app:confluence`. Inline operators are AND'd with structured `filters`.

page_size.description: Number of results to return per page.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination token from a previous response's `next_cursor` field. Omit on the first request.

datasources.description: Restrict results to specific datasources. Requests must not specify both `datasources` and `datasource_instances`.

datasource_instances.description: Restrict results to specific datasource instances. Values are datasource instance identifiers returned by `GET /api/search/filters`. Requests must not specify both `datasources` and `datasource_instances`.

items.description: A single filter criterion. For `EQUALS`, multiple values within a filter are OR'd. For `NOT_EQUALS`, multiple values exclude all listed values. Filters are AND'd with each other and with any inline query operators.

field.description: The field to filter on. Accepts built-in filter field names such as `type`, `owner`, `from`, `author`, `channel`, `status`, `assignee`, `reporter`, `component`, `mentions`, and `collection`, plus custom datasource property names.

values.description: One or more values to match.

operator.description: Comparison operator to apply to this filter. Defaults to `EQUALS`. `GT`, `GTE`, `LT`, and `LTE` range operators require exactly one value; express bounded ranges with multiple filters on the same field.

items.title: PlatformFilter

filters.description: Structured filters applied to search results. Equality operators OR multiple values within a filter. Multiple filters are AND'd together, including range filters on the same field. Filters are AND'd with any inline operators in `query`. Note that conflicting constraints on the same field (e.g., `type:document` in the query and `type: spreadsheet` in a filter) produce an empty result set.

time_range.description: Filter results to those last updated within this range.

start.description: Inclusive lower bound in ISO 8601 format.

end.description: Exclusive upper bound in ISO 8601 format.

time_range.title: PlatformTimeRange
